headline: Parameters:
summary: 1.6T total / 49B active (MoE); companion V4 Flash at 284B total / 13B active

headline: Context:
summary: 1M tokens (default across all DeepSeek services)

headline: License:
summary: MIT

headline: Weights:
summary: [huggingface.co/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Pro](https://huggingface.co/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Pro)

headline: Architecture:
summary: Hybrid Compressed Sparse Attention + Heavily Compressed Attention for long-context efficiency; Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections replace conventional residual links.

headline: Training hardware:
summary: Huawei Ascend 950 chips + Cambricon accelerators — zero Nvidia hardware; Huawei "Supernode" interconnect fabric.

headline: Benchmarks (vendor-claimed):
summary: SWE-bench Verified 80.6%; Codeforces rating 3,206 (highest reported at release, ahead of GPT-5.4 at 3,168).

headline: Pricing:
summary: $0.145/M input, $1.74/M output — approximately 7× cheaper than GPT-5.5 at comparable capability tiers.

headline: NIST/CAISI independent evaluation
summary: (May 2026): Finds V4 Pro "lags frontier by approximately 8 months," performing comparably to GPT-5 on non-public benchmarks.

headline: Parameters:
summary: 128B dense

headline: Context:
summary: 256k tokens

headline: License:
summary: Modified MIT (revenue carve-outs above certain revenue thresholds — not Apache 2.0)

headline: Weights:
summary: [huggingface.co/mistralai/Mistral-Medium-3.5-128B](https://huggingface.co/mistralai/Mistral-Medium-3.5-128B)

headline: Purpose:
summary: Unified instruction-following, reasoning, and code in one set of weights.

headline: Benchmarks:
summary: Mistral cites only internal comparisons in the official release; no third-party evaluation published yet.

headline: MLX/GGUF:
summary: No confirmed consumer ports as of today; 128B dense requires ~4 GPUs per Mistral's self-hosting docs, putting it out of reach on consumer Apple Silicon without quantization.

headline: Parameters:
summary: 754B total / 40B active (MoE)

headline: Context:
summary: 200K tokens; 131K max output

headline: License:
summary: MIT

headline: Weights:
summary: [huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-5.1](https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-5.1)

headline: Purpose:
summary: Agentic coding and long-horizon autonomous execution (sustains 8-hour sessions).

headline: Benchmark:
summary: Scored 58.4% on SWE-bench Pro at release — the first open-weight model to top that leaderboard, edging past GPT-5.4 (57.7%) and Claude Opus 4.6 (57.3%).

headline: Training hardware:
summary: 100,000 Huawei Ascend 910B chips.

headline: Sizes:
summary: E2B, E4B, 26B MoE, 31B Dense

headline: License:
summary: Apache 2.0

headline: Purpose:
summary: Reasoning, agentic AI, multimodal inputs; scales from smartphone to data center.

headline: Benchmark:
summary: 31B Dense ranks #3 on Chatbot Arena text leaderboard; 26B MoE ranks #6.

headline: MLX/GGUF:
summary: Gemma 4 31B available via Ollama 0.19 (MLX backend); fits in M3 Max 64GB at Q4 quantization [single-source on RAM estimate].

headline: Gemma 4 31B:
summary: Available via Ollama 0.19 (MLX).

headline: Mistral Medium 3.5 128B:
summary: No confirmed GGUF or MLX ports as of today.

headline: DeepSeek V4 Flash:
summary: Experimental llama.cpp fork from antirez ([github.com/antirez/llama.cpp-deepseek-v4-flash](https://github.com/antirez/llama.cpp-deepseek-v4-flash)); 18 tok/s on RTX 6000 96GB reported.

headline: GLM-5.1 754B:
summary: No practical consumer path; requires distributed multi-node inference.
